requirement.title: REQ-1099
requirement.requirement: The load limitation is activated if the summation of [EM2_TrqMin_Rq_MSSE + minimum permissible drag torque of power train] undershoots the torque limit M_Grenz_neg equal [negative permissible torque + torque offset for the load limitation] for longer than a calibratable time t_M_Grenz_neg (150 milliseconds; calibratable until 300 milliseconds).
